SEARCH
Package com.example.helios.service

Class WaitingListService

java.lang.Object
com.example.helios.service.WaitingListService
public class WaitingListService extends Object
Service for organizer-side waiting-list operations: retrieval, updates, invitations, cancellations, and auto-replacement draws.

    Description

    Method

    autoInviteReplacement(String eventId, com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<Boolean> onSuccess, com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
    Automatically invites one replacement entrant from the NOT_SELECTED pool.

    getEntriesForEvent(String eventId, com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<List<WaitingListEntry>> onSuccess, com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
    Retrieves all waiting list entries for a specific event.

  • Constructor Details

    • WaitingListService

      public WaitingListService()

    • WaitingListService

      public WaitingListService(@NonNull WaitingListRepository repository)

  • Method Details

    • getEntriesForEvent

      public void getEntriesForEvent(@NonNull String eventId, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<List<WaitingListEntry>> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
      Retrieves all waiting list entries for a specific event.
      Parameters:
      eventId - The unique identifier for the event.
      onSuccess - Callback receiving the list of waiting list entries.
      onFailure - Callback for failed operation.

    • updateEntry

      public void updateEntry(@NonNull String eventId, @NonNull WaitingListEntry entry, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<Void> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
      Updates an existing waiting list entry.
      Parameters:
      eventId - The unique identifier for the event.
      entry - The updated waiting list entry.
      onSuccess - Callback for successful operation.
      onFailure - Callback for failed operation.

    • removeEntry

      public void removeEntry(@NonNull String eventId, @NonNull String entrantUid, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<Void> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
      Removes an entry from a waiting list.
      Parameters:
      eventId - The unique identifier for the event.
      entrantUid - The unique identifier for the entrant.
      onSuccess - Callback for successful operation.
      onFailure - Callback for failed operation.

    • autoInviteReplacement

      public void autoInviteReplacement(@NonNull String eventId, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<Boolean> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
      Automatically invites one replacement entrant from the NOT_SELECTED pool. Used to trigger a replacement draw when a winner declines their invitation.
      Parameters:
      eventId - The unique identifier for the event.
      onSuccess - Callback called with true if a replacement was invited, false if pool is empty.
      onFailure - Callback for failed operation.

    • inviteEntrantToWaitingList

      public void inviteEntrantToWaitingList(@NonNull String eventId, @NonNull String entrantUid, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<Void> onSuccess, @NonNull com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnFailureListener onFailure)
